name: Gedunstetes Rotkraut in Rotwein (Braised Red Cabbage)
recipeIngredient: 2 oz Lemon juice or cider vinegar
4 lb Red cabbage, peeled and cored
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onions and sauté until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
3. Stir in sugar and continue cooking for another minute or two until lightly browned.
4. Add lemon juice or vinegar to deglaze the pan, scraping up any brown bits from the bottom.
5. Add cabbage, apples, red wine, salt, and pepper; mix well.
6. Cover and simmer on low heat for about 30-40 minutes, or until the cabbage is tender but still has some bite (crispness).
7. Remove cinnamon stick before serving.
